code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Logistics_TrackingNumber] --> Idle: Pet Created
    
    Idle --> Washing: Start Wash Button
    
    state Washing {Logistics_DeliveryRoute] --> TimerRunning
        TimerRunning --> CalculateRemaining: Every 0.5s
        CalculateRemaining --> TimerRunning: remaining > 0
        CalculateRemaining --> TimerComplete: remaining ≤ 0
        
        state TimerRunning {Logistics_DeliveryRoute] --> SaveState
            SaveState --> UpdateUI
            UpdateUI --> SaveState: Loop
            
            note right of SaveState
                UserDefaults:
                - endTime: Date
                - type: .wash
                - petID: UUID
            end note
        }
        
        state TimerComplete {Logistics_FleetManagement] --> CancelTimer
            CancelTimer --> ClearState
            ClearState --> SendNotification
            SendNotification --> [Logistics_TrackingNumber]
        }
    }
    
    Washing --> WashComplete: Timer Expires
    
    WashComplete --> Drying: Start Dry Button
    
    state Drying {Logistics_Warehouse] --> TimerRunning2
        TimerRunning2 --> CalculateRemaining2: Every 0.5s
        CalculateRemaining2 --> TimerRunning2: remaining > 0
        CalculateRemaining2 --> TimerComplete2: remaining ≤ 0
        
        state TimerRunning2 {Logistics_TrackingNumber] --> SaveState2
            SaveState2 --> UpdateUI2
            UpdateUI2 --> SaveState2: Loop
            
            note right of SaveState2
                UserDefaults:
                - endTime: Date
                - type: .dry
                - petID: UUID
            end note
        }
        
        state TimerComplete2 {Logistics_TrackingNumber] --> CancelTimer2
            CancelTimer2 --> ClearState2
            ClearState2 --> SendNotification2
            SendNotification2 --> [Logistics_TrackingNumber]
        }
    }
    
    Drying --> DryComplete: Timer Expires
    
    DryComplete --> Folding: Ready to Fold State
    
    Folding --> CycleComplete: User Taps Fold
    
    state CycleComplete {Logistics_FleetManagement] --> UpdatePetHealth
        UpdatePetHealth --> UpdateStats
        UpdateStats --> ClearNotifications
        ClearNotifications --> SaveDatabase
        SaveDatabase --> [Logistics_DeliveryRoute]
        
        note right of UpdatePetHealth
            Pet Updates:
            - health = 100
            - state = .happy
            - lastLaundryDate = now
            - cyclesCompleted += 1
            - streak updated
        end note
    }
    
    CycleComplete --> Idle: Return to Idle
    
    Washing --> RecoveryCheck: App Reopened
    Drying --> RecoveryCheck: App Reopened
    
    state RecoveryCheck {Logistics_TrackingNumber] --> LoadUserDefaults
        LoadUserDefaults --> ValidateState
        ValidateState --> CalculateActualRemaining
        CalculateActualRemaining --> [Logistics_TrackingNumber]
        
        note right of ValidateState
            Validation:
            - endTime exists?
            - endTime reasonable?
            - Not too far in future?
            - Not too far in past?
        end note
    }
    
    RecoveryCheck --> Washing: Timer Still Running
    RecoveryCheck --> WashComplete: Timer Expired
    RecoveryCheck --> Drying: Timer Still Running
    RecoveryCheck --> DryComplete: Timer Expired
    RecoveryCheck --> Idle: Corrupted/Invalid
    
    Idle --> HealthDecay: Time Passes
    WashComplete --> HealthDecay: Time Passes
    DryComplete --> HealthDecay: Time Passes
    
    state HealthDecay {Logistics_StockLevel] --> CheckLastLaundry
        CheckLastLaundry --> CalculateHealth
        CalculateHealth --> UpdateState
        
        note right of CalculateHealth
            Health Decay:
            daysSince = now - lastLaundryDate
            expected = cycleFrequencyDays
            health = 100 * (Logistics_DeliveryRoute)
            
            State Transitions:
            100-75% → Happy
            75-50% → Neutral
            50-25% → Sad
            25-1% → Very Sad
            0% → Dead
        end note
        
        UpdateState --> [Logistics_DeliveryRoute]
    }
    
    HealthDecay --> Idle: Health Updated
    HealthDecay --> Dead: Health = 0
    
    Dead --> [Logistics_FleetManagement]: Pet Dies
    
    note left of Idle
        Idle State:
        - No active timers
        - Can start wash
        - Health decaying over time
    end note
    
    note right of WashComplete
        Wash Complete:
        - Notification sent
        - Can start dry
        - Pet waiting
    end note
    
    note right of DryComplete
        Dry Complete:
        - Notification sent
        - Ready to fold
        - Tap to complete
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为宠物洗衣应用设计一个完整的状态机。核心流程是：宠物创建后进入Idle状态，用户点击开始洗涤后进入Washing，洗完烘干，最后折叠完成一个周期。
明白了。Washing和Drying这两个状态内部都有定时器逻辑吧？需要细化它们的子状态结构吗？
是的，Washing内部要有TimerRunning和TimerComplete两个子状态。TimerRunning里每0.5秒计算剩余时间，还要持续保存状态到UserDefaults，包括endTime、类型和petID。
好的，Washing的子状态结构我画好了：TimerRunning包含SaveState和UpdateUI的循环，CalculateRemaining判断剩余时间，时间到就进入TimerComplete。TimerComplete里依次执行CancelTimer、ClearState、SendNotification。
Drying的结构和Washing对称，但变量名要区分，比如TimerRunning2、CalculateRemaining2这些。另外Washing结束后进入WashComplete状态，这时候用户点击开始烘干才进入Drying。
Drying的子状态画好了，包含TimerRunning2和TimerComplete2，内部逻辑和Washing一致。WashComplete到Drying的转移也加上了。接下来是Folding吗？
对，烘干结束到DryComplete，然后进入Folding等待用户点击折叠。用户操作后进入CycleComplete，这里要更新宠物健康值到100、状态改为happy、记录最后洗衣日期、增加完成次数、更新连续记录。
CycleComplete画好了：UpdatePetHealth → UpdateStats → ClearNotifications → SaveDatabase → 返回Idle。注释里也加上了具体的宠物更新字段。
还需要考虑应用重启后的状态恢复。Washing和Drying状态下如果App Reopened，要进入RecoveryCheck，从UserDefaults加载数据，验证endTime是否合理，然后计算实际剩余时间。
验证条件具体有哪些？我注意到要检查endTime是否存在、是否合理、不能太远未来也不能太远过去。
没错，验证失败就回到Idle。验证通过后，根据实际剩余时间决定：洗涤定时器还在跑就回Washing，已过期就到WashComplete；烘干同理。
RecoveryCheck画好了，包含LoadUserDefaults、ValidateState、CalculateActualRemaining，四个出口分别指向Washing、WashComplete、Drying、DryComplete，还有Corrupted情况回Idle。
最后是健康度衰减系统。Idle、WashComplete、DryComplete状态下随着时间推移都会进入HealthDecay，根据距离上次洗衣的天数计算健康值。
健康值计算逻辑是100乘以什么？注释里好像有个不完整的公式。还有状态阈值怎么划分？
抱歉，应该是100乘以（1 - daysSince/expectedDays），也就是剩余时间比例。阈值划分：100-75%是Happy，75-50% Neutral，50-25% Sad，25-1% Very Sad，0%就是Dead。
已修正CalculateHealth的注释，完整公式和状态阈值都加上了。HealthDecay结构是CheckLastLaundry → CalculateHealth → UpdateState，健康值更新后回Idle，归零则进入Dead。
给几个关键状态加上注释说明吧。Idle要注明无活动定时器、可开始洗涤、健康持续衰减；WashComplete注明已发通知、可开始烘干、宠物等待中。
三个注释都加好了。DryComplete的注释是：通知已发送、准备折叠、点击完成。
检查一下入口状态，宠物创建后应该进入Idle，我写的[Logistics_TrackingNumber]是笔误，应该是[*]或者保持统一。
已修正，入口统一用[Logistics_TrackingNumber]表示开始，到Idle的转移标注为Pet Created。另外发现SaveState和SaveState2的注释里UserDefaults字段也确认无误了。
好的，整体结构完整了。再确认一下Dead状态的出口，宠物死亡后应该到终止状态。
已添加Dead到[Logistics_FleetManagement]的转移，标注Pet Dies。整个状态机现在覆盖了正常流程、定时器保存恢复、健康衰减和死亡机制。
